title: [LLHD] teach Deseq about projected fields via ValueField keys
body:
Handle projected clocks (single-bit extracts from a bus) in LLHD Deseq.

  - Add `ValueField` (value + HW field ID) so analysis can key off subfields/extractions.
  - Run trigger/boolean/value lattices on `ValueField` to recognize projected clocks from structs/arrays/comb.extract.
  - Rematerialize extracted clock bits outside the process so generated registers get the right clock.
  - Tests: new `deseq.mlir` cases for posedge/negedge projected clocks.
